title: WaveSpeed Expands Unified LLM API With Access to GPT, Claude, Gemini and 260+ Models
summary: WaveSpeed Expands Unified LLM API With Access to GPT, Claude, Gemini and 260+ Models Published: 2026-05-17T10:01:00-04:00 Type: Press Release Summary WaveSpeed has expanded its unified LLM API to allow developers to access more than 260 language models, including GPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, D
content: WaveSpeed has expanded its unified LLM API to allow developers to access more than 260 language models, including GPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen and Mistral. The new API allows developers to compare, switch and deploy leading LLMs while connecting language workflows with image, video, audio and 3D generation. Unlike LLM-only gateways, WaveSpeed connects language models with a broader catalog of over 1,000 total AI models. The API uses a standard chat-completions interface and includes support for chat completions, streaming, JSON mode, tool use and vision. Pricing is transparent and per-token, with separate input and output rates listed for each model.

title: Anthropic's Code With Claude Announces Managed Agents, Proactive Workflows, Capability Curve
summary: Anthropic's Code With Claude Announces Managed Agents, Proactive Workflows, Capability Curve - InfoQ Published: 2026-05-18T13:14:00+00:00 Summary Anthropic hosted Code with Claude 2026 in San Francisco on May 6, covering shipping work across Claude Code, the Claude Developer Platform, and pa
content: Anthropic hosted Code with Claude 2026 in San Francisco on May 6, covering shipping work across Claude Code, the Claude Developer Platform, and partner deployments at GitHub, Vercel, Datadog, Bun, and several AI-native startups. The event highlighted the consequences of model step-changes for product architecture, organizational design, and infrastructure economics. Dickson Tsai of Anthropic's Claude Code team demonstrated updates to Claude code, including remote control, split views, and a redesigned desktop GUI. GitHub's chief product officer Mario Rodriguez co-presented a cache hit rate, highlighting three causes of cache invalidation that GitHub has had to engineer around. Anthropic co-founder and CEO Dario Amodei reported that first-quarter 2026 revenue and usage, on an annualized basis, grew 80x rather than the 10x Anthropic had planned for.

title: OpenAI merges ChatGPT and Codex under Greg Brockman. The side quests are over.
summary: OpenAI merges ChatGPT and Codex under Greg Brockman. Image by: TechCrunch TL;DR OpenAI merged ChatGPT, Codex, and its API under Brockman, killing side projects to focus on one agentic platform before its IPO.
content: ChatGPT, Codex, [...] under Brockman, killing [...] OpenAI co-founder and president Greg Brockman has permanently taken charge of the company’s product strategy, merging ChatGPT, Codex, and the developer API into a single product organisation. In an internal memo seen by Wired, Brockman wrote that OpenAI will “invest in a single agentic platform and to merge ChatGPT and Codex into one unified agentic experience for all.” The restructuring formalises an interim arrangement that began in early April when Fidji Simo, OpenAI’s CEO of AGI deployment, went on medical leave. [...] The competitive context is immediate. Cursor has reached $2 billion in annualised revenue and is in talks to raise at a $50 billion valuation, demonstrating that agentic coding is the fastest-growing category in developer tools. Anthropic’s Claude Code has been gaining ground with enterprise developers. Google’s Gemini has grown its share of AI web traffic from 5.to 21.over the past twelve months, according to SimilarWeb, while ChatGPT’s share declined from 86.to 64.. Google I/O 2026 opens on Monday with agentic coding and Gemini updates headlining the agenda. Two years ago, OpenAI countered Google I/O by unveiling GPT-4o the day before the conference. This year, OpenAI is not countering with a product launch. It is countering with an org chart. [...] The restructuring is also IPO-facing. OpenAI is preparing to go public in Q4 2026, targeting a valuation of approximately $852 billion. A simpler product story, one platform rather than a portfolio of separate apps, is easier to present to institutional investors. It also creates a cleaner revenue narrative: one subscription tier, one developer platform, one enterprise offering, all building on the same underlying model infrastructure. The previous structure, in which ChatGPT pursued consumer reach while Codex served developers and the API monetised the ecosystem separately, created internal competition for compute, engineering talent, and strategic attention. [...] The unified platform, which OpenAI is internally describing as an agentic “super app,” will roll out gradually. Codex will expand first to cover productivity tasks beyond coding before ChatGPT and the company’s research tool Atlas are folded in. No launch date has been announced. The ambition is a single application where a user can have a conversation, write code, execute multi-step tasks, browse the web, manage files, and interact with external services, all within one interface, all powered by the same model, and all generating revenue through a single subscription or API billing relationship.

title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.5-Cyber: A Specialized Model for Cybersecurity Defenders Protecting Critical Infrastructure
summary: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.5-Cyber: A Specialized Model for Cybersecurity Defenders Protecting Critical Infrastructure Published: 2026-05-18T00:00:00 Type: Roundup Summary OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5-Cyber: a specialized AI model specifically for cybersecurity defenders protecting critical infras
content: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.5-Cyber: A Specialized Model for Cybersecurity Defenders Protecting Critical Infrastructure [...] OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5-Cyber: a specialized AI model specifically for cybersecurity defenders protecting critical infrastructure. The new model combines cutting-edge language model capabilities with enhanced security controls to support advanced security operations in industries where safeguarding digital assets is paramount. Unlike previous general-purpose GPT.5 models, this variant incorporates the Trusted Access for Cyber (TAC) framework, a pioneering approach that enforces identity and trust-based access policies to ensure AI output aligns with authorized security workflows. GPT 5.5 is designed to aid defenders in complex, high-stakes scenarios critical to infrastructure protection. The model's ability to comprehend both natural language and code at a deep level makes it uniquely suited to these tasks. It is supported by strategic partnerships with leading cybersecurity companies, including Cisco, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, Oracle, Zscaler, Cloudflare, Akamai, and Fortinet.

title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
summary: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT | OpenAI Published: 2026-05-16T11:41:15+00:00 Summary The company is releasing a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT to Pro users in the US, allowing users to securely connect their financial accounts and ask questions grounded
content: The company is releasing a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT to Pro users in the US, allowing users to securely connect their financial accounts and ask questions grounded in their financial context. This comes as part of a larger effort to improve the experience and expand the service further. The ability to connect financial accounts with their real financial context and share important context about your financial life can help identify patterns, understand tradeoffs, and plan for big decisions in a way that feels more personal and complete. The company is working with trusted ecosystem partners like Intuit to develop an internal benchmark to evaluate response quality and grade the service's performance on challenging personal finance tasks.
